creator: sheepkiller@cultdeadsheep.org
text:
Hi,

pkg-plist file is incorrectly named (should be pkg-plist)
Since APACHE_VERSION isn't exported to PLIST_SUB, you can't use it in 
your plist.

Here's a correct plist file:
crashbox$ cat pkg-plist 
%%APACHEMODDIR%%/mod_wombat.so

regards,
clem
